case_title: ANTONIO JUAREZ LOPEZ VS. GENERAL MOTORS LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210084128) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ANTONIO JUAREZ , AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-30-2024 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-29-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-07-2024
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73509945) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210084128) TO PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ANTONIO JUAREZ , AN INDIVIDUAL
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 74747768) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR SEP-02-2025 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-30-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MOTION IN LIMINE NO. 3 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO PROHIBIT TESTIMONY OR EVIDENCE REGARDING ANY CLAIM OF A DISCLAIMER OF THE IMPLIED WARRANTY OF MERCHANTABILITY (TRANSACTION ID # 76887252) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ANTONIO JUAREZ , AN INDIVIDUAL

MOTION IN LIMINE, NO. 7 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO EXCLUDE EVIDENCE OR ARGUMENT BY DEFENDANT AS TO LACK OF MAINTENANCE, ABUSE, OR NEGLECT (TRANSACTION ID # 76887252) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ANTONIO JUAREZ , AN INDIVIDUAL

MOTION IN LIMINE, NO. 9 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO PROHIBIT TESTIMONY OR EVIDENCE NOT PREVIOUSLY IDENTIFIED OR CONTAINED WITHIN DEFENDANT?S FORMAL DISCOVERY RESPONSES (TRANSACTION ID # 76887252) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ANTONIO JUAREZ , AN INDIVIDUAL

MASTER JURY TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-02-2025 AT 9:30AM. THE COURT PASSED THIS MATTER UNTIL 10:30AM DUE TO THE DELAY OF DEFENDANT'S FLIGHT. ATTORNEY KENNETH TSANG SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF. ATTORNEY CAMERON MAJOR APPEARED FOR DEFENDANT. SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 AGAINST DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY CAMERON MAJOR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-05-2025. BOTH SIDES ARE NOT READY FOR TRIAL. THE COURT CONTINUED THIS TRIAL TO SEP-15-2025 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 TO ALLOW TIME FOR PARTIES TO FINALIZE THEIR SETTLEMENT WITH THE MEDIATOR. NOTICE OF TRIAL WAIVED. JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MOTION IN LIMINE, NO. 4 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO PROHIBIT DEFENDANT FROM ASSERTING DEFENSES OR OFFERING TESTIMONY NOT GIVEN AT DEPOSITION (TRANSACTION ID # 76887252) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ANTONIO JUAREZ , AN INDIVIDUAL
